name: 54 Capital
description: Private Equity asset manager focused on Africa. Over the last 4 years has invested more than 160 million USD in Ethiopia, all in equity, making it the largest financial investor in Ethiopia today. Exposure spans various FMCG sub‑sectors and pharmaceuticals.

Home
###  About our firm
54 Capital is an Africa-focused asset manager with a focus on investing in high growth opportunities that can benefit from on-the-ground expertise to capture new markets and streamline their business.
Since our establishment in 2013, we’ve been investing in African countries and sectors that show promising growth potential, especially those benefiting from a growing middle class with an active consumer base. Our aim for the companies we invest in is simple: we want them to actively contribute to improving the lives of their employees, society, and the overall business landscape.
[ KnowMore ](https://54capital.com/our-firm)
![54-capital-Infographics-Web](https://54capital.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/54-capital-Infographics-Web.png)
![](https://54capital.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/54-capital-Infographics-mob.png)
Investment
###  Our Investment Approach
Our investment strategy focuses on companies that resonate with Africa’s growth drivers, sector priorities, and our expertise in nurturing market leaders. Through a hands-on approach, we actively engage in crafting, executing, and overseeing our value creation initiatives.
We carefully identify investment opportunities where our capital can drive meaningful impact, tapping into untapped market potential, including greenfield sites, to fully seize available opportunities.
[ KnowMore ](https://54capital.com/our-approach)

tavily.answer:
54 Capital is an Africa-focused asset manager founded in 2013, with an agile deal-by-deal strategy. Its official website is https://54capital.com. The firm focuses on high-growth opportunities in Africa.
54 Capital is an Africa-focused asset manager founded in 2013 with $200 million in assets under management, headquartered in Dubai. It focuses on fast-growing assets in Ethiopia's FMCG and pharmaceutical sectors. The firm has 11-50 employees.
54 Capital is an Africa-focused asset manager established in 2013, investing in high-growth opportunities. Crunchbase provides business information on private and public companies globally. Crunchbase's Q1 2026 report shows mixed startup investment trends.
54 Capital is an Africa-focused asset manager founded in 2013, investing in high-growth opportunities. Wellfound is a privately held company, not publicly traded, and focuses on talent and product hunt services. Wellfound was spun out from AngelList Talent in 2022.
54 Capital is an Africa-focused asset manager founded in 2013, investing in high-growth opportunities. It has a significant presence in Ethiopia and operates from Dubai. Dealroom.co is a global data platform for startup intelligence.
